text:
1. Determine the time difference: Europe/Athens is UTC + 3, US/Eastern is UTC - 5. The time difference is 3 - (-5)=8 hours.
2. Subtract the time difference from the given time: 07:00 - 08:00 = 23:00 (previous day).
3. Adjust the date: August 8, 1737 becomes August 7, 1737.
FINAL_ANSWER: 23:00 on August 7, 1737
